name: Confederate Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the melted butter with eggs and sugar in an electric mixer on medium speed for 2-3 minutes, or until well combined.
2. Stir the cornstarch into the half-and-half to dissolve, then pour this mixture into the egg mixture.
3. Add the lemon juice and stir until everything is well mixed.
4. Pour the batter into the pie shell.
5. Bake at 300 degrees Fahrenheit for 1-1/2 hours, or until the top is browned and set in the center. To check if the pie is done, gently shake the pan; the filling should shiver in the middle without being runny.
